data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: Adobe's systems leverage cloud services to ensure scalability and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Uses AWS and Azure for hosting and storage

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Applications are broken down into smaller, manageable services.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Docker and Kubernetes for containerization

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Uses CDNs to deliver content swiftly across geographies.

data.title: RESTful APIs
data.description: APIs are designed to be RESTful, ensuring integration with external systems.
data.technical_spec: Follows HTTP/HTTPS protocols and JSON standards

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Utilizes serverless frameworks to run tasks and processes.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates AWS Lambda and Azure Functions
